title: Prepared Statement is not working, executing prepared statement always need to rebind and replan
description:
### What happens?

We want to execute a complex query multiple times using prepared statement, but executing prepared statement always need to rebind and replan the query.


### To Reproduce

How to reproduce it:
```
CREATE TABLE tbl(col INTEGER);
INSERT INTO tbl VALUES (1), (2), (3);
prepare myquery as select * from tbl where col = ?;

PRAGMA enable_profiling = 'json';
PRAGMA profiling_output = './profile.json';
PRAGMA profiling_mode = 'detailed';
execute myquery(1);
```

Check the output profile.json file, you can find it will still take some time to plan and optimization. We also test this using big queries, and find the execution don't reuse the prepared statement plan.

Some investigations may help to debug this issue:
In `PreparedStatementData::RequireRebind` method, the `return_type` of `value_map` is not expected as `INVALID`

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ca03f983-0a58-4f76-91be-ac26fd4be64e)
